Name: l1d_read_access_all
Description: Event (speculative) for a l1d_cache access caused by a all demand memory-read operation. Does not include accesses to IO or noncacheable regions

Name: l1d_read_miss
Description: Event (speculative) for a l1d_cache refill that is due to a demand memory-read operation. Does not include accesses to IO or noncacheable regions

Name: op_retired_direct_branch
Description: Event for each retired direct control flow instruction

Name: op_retired_ret_branch
Description: Event for each retired control flow instruction that uses the return address stack for prediction

Name: op_retired_indirect_branch
Description: Event for each retired indirect control flow instruction that uses the Branch Target Predictor for prediction. Return instructions are not included

Name: op_retired_cond_branch
Description: Event for each retired conditional control flow instruction that uses the Branch Direction Predictor
